heroTitle: Decentralized holarchic mesh for the sovereign era.
heroLead: Nexa is more than a protocol. It is an architecture for the sovereign human—acknowledging the inherent power and divinity of the individual through decentralized holarchy and Level -1 physical anchors.
funnelSubline: Audit → Isolation → Sovereignty. Your devices, your nodes, your control.
problemHeadline: The cloud is a centralized trap.
problemBody: Modern systems trade sovereignty for convenience. Nexa replaces brittle, centralized infrastructure with a resilient mesh that operates offline-first and protects your data with hardware-bound keys at Level -1.
phaseOneBody: Cognitive protection for the next generation. We strip algorithmic manipulation and predatory loops at the protocol layer to protect developing minds.
phaseTwoBody: The cognitive filter. Cerberus distills complex mesh telemetry into human-scale decisions, ensuring operators keep visibility without being overwhelmed.
phaseThreeBody: Full data ownership. Your data is encrypted with Argon2id on your devices. The mesh stores blobs; you hold the keys.
journeySteps: Provision your local cell (Level -1 hardware anchor).
Connect to the Mesh via a Trusted Hub.
auditCtaBody: Start your journey into the sovereign mesh. We provide the protocol specs, hardware requirements, and the first governed lane to deploy.
saasCtaBody: Securely manage the interface between human organizations, automated synthetic entities, and biological nodes in one coherent system.
intakeBody: Define your cell's requirements. We return a deployment map, risk notes, and the first sovereign lane worth shipping.
companyPlaceholder: Alpha Hub, Omega Spoke, Personal Node
successBody: Your request is propagating through the mesh. Expect a protocol handshake within 48 hours.
proofBody: Nexa is designed for teams that cannot afford centralized failure. Compliance, revenue movement, and ecological monitoring are secured by node-based validation.

systemCards.title: Holarchic Routing
systemCards.body: Hub-and-Spoke connectivity with mathematical divergence checks to prevent network poisoning.

systemCards.title: Behavioral Auth
systemCards.body: Your signature is part of the key. K-Dynamics and T-Fingerprints ensure only you can operate your cell.

systemCards.title: Purgatory Protocol
systemCards.body: Constructive correction for system jitter. Hostile actors are redirected to serve the mesh's security.

deliverySteps.title: Anchor
deliverySteps.body: Initialize your Level -1 physical HSM and establish the local cryptographic foundation.

deliverySteps.title: Mesh
deliverySteps.body: Connect to the distributed network and synchronize your encrypted blobs across the mesh.

deliverySteps.title: Aegis
deliverySteps.body: Apply cognitive filters and behavioral tripwires to protect your data and the minds of your users.

deliverySteps.title: Sovereign
deliverySteps.body: Operate autonomously with full local control and global mesh resilience.

rails: Physical bodies stay at Level -1 for maximum kinetic safety
M-of-N Sharded Social Recovery for lost access
Zero-knowledge attestation for diplomatic identity bridges
Algorithmic shielding to prevent cognitive manipulation
footerNote: Nexa is a global protocol for human and biological collaboration. Sovereign by nature, decentralized by design.
launchSurfaceTitle: A clean public surface for a complex distributed world.
launchSurfaceBody: The Nexa landing page is the first step in the mesh. It's where public recognition meets private sovereignty, bridging the old world with the new holarchy.
formFootnote: Nexa Protocol v0.1 · Architected by RALPH.
